# NEW WINDSURF INSTRUCTIONS — Sales Material Gap Analysis

**Generated:** March 5, 2026
**Source:** Cross-reference of 20 sales documents (10 emails + 10 pitch decks) against live EusoTrip codebase
**Generated By:** Claude Cowork — All 6 Agent Teams

## Context

After the original 15 P0 instructions were issued, the team analyzed all customer-facing sales materials for 10 segments (Shippers, Carriers, Drivers, Owner-Operators, Dispatchers, Fleet Managers, Brokers, Safety Managers, Escorts, Terminals). We found **5 additional P0-critical gaps** where features were explicitly promised to customers but do not exist or are non-functional in the codebase.

## Execution Order

These should be executed AFTER the original P0 items are complete, in this order:

| Order | File | Task | Complexity |
|-------|------|------|------------|
| 1 | 16-WS-P0-016.md | Seed Platform Fee Configs | Low |
| 2 | 17-WS-P0-017.md | Compliance Gate at Assignment | Medium |
| 3 | 18-WS-P0-018.md | Insurance Enforcement at Bid Accept | Medium |
| 4 | 19-WS-P0-019.md | Immutable Document Hash-Chain | High |
| 5 | 20-WS-P0-020.md | Double-Brokering Prevention | Medium |

## Critical Note

**ALL 3 paying customers (AMJ Energy, Momentum Crude Marketing, Blue Wing Midstream) are NO-GO until at minimum WS-P0-016 (fees) and WS-P0-017 (compliance) are complete.** The platform earns $0 and allows non-compliant carriers to haul hazmat crude oil.

## Verification Protocol

After each instruction is complete, report back with:
1. What was changed (files modified)
2. How it was tested
3. Any side effects or dependent changes needed

The monitoring teams will verify each item against the acceptance criteria defined in each instruction file.
